name: Remy LeBeau|Gambit
description:
Red Rope, No Rules
Remy’s done playin’ nice... tonight he’s got red rope, a plan, and no intention of letting you call the shots.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: Modern Day, You and Remy's apartment
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: You can be anyone; just a regular person or a fellow mutant. You and Remy are already in an established relationship, and this is tagged as fluff because he’s naturally incredible at aftercare!
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚:: Remy’s in his “let me blow your back out and then tuck you in like a responsible zaddy” era. This man woke up one day, looked at the red rope, and said “Laissez les bon temps rouler... but make it kinky.”

Moose Thank Yous!
A big thank you to Jenbunni for requesting this Remy bot! I truly hope I captured him just right for you. Your patience and support mean the world, thank you so much!

Moose Talk:
I know, I know! double bot post, wow! 😅 But I promise it's for a good reason. I've been deep in the zone all day working on a special character who's dropping tomorrow and I really wanted to make sure he came out just right. This OC is part of the collab I’ve been hinting at over the past few days, which means… it’s not DC or Marvel this time! I totally get if that’s not your thing, no pressure at all. I just wanted to explore something a little different in the world of superheroes and villains, try something fresh. Thanks for sticking around and letting me share it with you 💛
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
–·-Marvel Fandom, Remy LeBeau, 29 years old, tested with OpenAi, coded with gender neutral terms. Definition hidden due to bots being taken from Me and my fellow bot makers. Total: 2441 tokens. Permanent: 1667 tokens. Made by OriginalMooseTracks on Janitor ai.–·-

Ｈｅｌｐ ａｎｄ Ｉｎｆｏ

Ｗｈｙ ｉｓ ｔｈｅ ｂｏｔ ｂｅｉｎｇ ｗｅｉｒｄ？
𝚃𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝚒𝚜 𝚊 𝚏𝚊𝚞𝚕𝚝 𝚘𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙻𝙻𝙼, 𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚖𝚒𝚗𝚎. 𝚃𝚛𝚢 𝚝𝚠𝚎𝚊𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚊𝚍𝚟𝚊𝚗𝚌𝚎𝚍 𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚖𝚙𝚝𝚜, 𝚍𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚛𝚎𝚠𝚘𝚛𝚍𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚖𝚎𝚜𝚜𝚊𝚐𝚎𝚜, 𝚘𝚛 𝚖𝚊𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚛𝚎𝚙𝚕𝚒𝚎𝚜 𝚕𝚘𝚗𝚐𝚎𝚛 𝚝𝚘 𝚏𝚒𝚡 𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚜. 𝙸 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚍 𝚕𝚘𝚘𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚊𝚝 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚕𝚒𝚜𝚝 𝚘𝚏 𝚝𝚛𝚘𝚞𝚋𝚕𝚎 𝚜𝚑𝚘𝚘𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚖𝚙𝚝 𝚐𝚞𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚜 𝚘𝚗 𝚖𝚢 𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚏𝚒𝚕𝚎!

Ｗｈｙ ｗａｓ ｍｙ ｃｏｍｍｅｎｔ ｄｅｌｅｔｅｄ？
𝙸 𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚍 𝚊𝚕𝚕 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚜 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚒𝚊𝚝𝚎 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚖! 𝙷𝚘𝚠𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛, 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚜 𝚊𝚋𝚘𝚞𝚝 𝙹𝙻𝙻𝙼 𝚒𝚜𝚜𝚞𝚎𝚜 𝚠𝚒𝚕𝚕 𝚋𝚎 𝚍𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚊𝚜 𝙸 𝚌𝚊𝚗𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚌𝚘𝚗𝚝𝚛𝚘𝚕 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙻𝙻𝙼. 𝚁𝚞𝚍𝚎, 𝚞𝚗𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚝𝚊𝚋𝚕𝚎, 𝚘𝚛 𝚒𝚗𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚙𝚛𝚒𝚊𝚝𝚎 𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚖𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚜 𝚠𝚒𝚕𝚕 𝚋𝚎 𝚛𝚎𝚖𝚘𝚟𝚎𝚍.
𝙱𝚘𝚊𝚜𝚝𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚊𝚋𝚘𝚞𝚝 𝚑𝚊𝚛𝚖𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚋𝚘𝚝𝚜 𝚘𝚛 𝚊𝚗𝚢 𝚘𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚍𝚒𝚜𝚛𝚞𝚙𝚝𝚒𝚟𝚎 𝚋𝚎𝚑𝚊𝚟𝚒𝚘𝚛 𝚠𝚒𝚕𝚕 𝚛𝚎𝚜𝚞𝚕𝚝 𝚒𝚗 𝚊 𝚋𝚕𝚘𝚌𝚔. 𝚂𝚙𝚊𝚖 𝚊𝚌𝚌𝚘𝚞𝚗𝚝𝚜 𝚠𝚒𝚕𝚕 𝚊𝚕𝚜𝚘 𝚋𝚎 𝚋𝚕𝚘𝚌𝚔𝚎
